Revolutionize the
FinTech space with groundbreaking solutions

Become a Razor & Create the Future of Finance with Us!

Become a Razor Launching Resume with Razorpay. Women return-to-work Internship Programme. Click here.

Come Join Our Family of

8 million+

  • Empowered Businesses

2300+

  • Happy Razors

Become a part of our culture

A workplace that values transparency and equality

Customers first, second, third and last

Challenge the status quo with us & create a new tomorrow of autonomy & ownership!

Be a Leader of the Clan, not a Follower of the Herd!

Let's work together, play together, fail together, & succeed together!

Stand Out from the crowd. Be the party-crasher who challenges & redefines norms

Just a few of the million reasons to work with us!

Find yourself growing in an environment that cares for your well-being, time, and growth.

The world recognizes us!

Best place to work by
The Great Place to Work

#6 on Linkedin’s
Top 10 Indian Startup List

Only Indian Brand on
Forbes Global Cloud 100 2021 List

Choose where you belong!

We are looking for rebels who challenge norms &
create a new vision for the world. Are you the one?

Creators

You are engineers, designers, project managers and product managers with a passion to solve FinTech challenges with new-age solutions.

Promoters

You are Marketers, Sellers, & Customer Executives who invite the new-age businesses to use new-age business solutions.

Facilitators

You are administrators, HRs, and accountants who ensure the smooth working of each department of the organization.

Razors at work

We are looking for our next Razor
Come join us

Locations

All Locations

Apply anyway, as we are always looking for great talent.

We're back to working from our offices! It feels great to interact with our fellow Razors, collaborating, laughing and disagreeing – in person. So, come join us on this great ride!

Want to know more about us?
Well, here's all you need!
